stem: A circle in the xy-plane has center at point (3, -2). Point (7, 1) lies on the circle. What is the equation of this circle?
explanation: The standard form is (x-h)²+(y-k)²=r². Center (3,-2): (x-3)²+(y+2)²=r². Find r²: (7-3)²+(1-(-2))²=16+9=25. Equation: (x-3)²+(y+2)²=25.

distractorRationale.C: Sign errors: (x+3) instead of (x-3), (y-2) instead of (y+2).
distractorRationale.D: Uses point (7,1) as center and r=5 instead of r²=25.
